infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Melange needs access to your camera to take photos for your profile and posts.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Melange needs access to your photo library so you can pick photos for your profile and posts.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryAddUsageDescription: Melange may save photos to your library when you choose to.
